name: Chicken'n Olives
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds chicken pieces, cut into serving pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken pieces and pat them dry.
2. Lightly season with salt and pepper.
3. Combine all ingredients except chicken and rice in a crock pot; stir well.
4. Add chicken pieces, coating them well so that they are moistened. Make sure all chicken is covered.
5. Cover the crock pot and cook on low setting for 7 to 9 hours.
